summary: Tested Fabric Catalogue and Size Guide features. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend features verified - Fabric Catalogue page loads correctly with search, filter, Add Fabric dialog with all required fields. Size Guide popup works correctly and changes content based on selected category (Tops/Bottoms).

features_tested.feature: Fabric Catalogue - Page loads without errors
features_tested.details: Page loads with header, tabs (Fabric Catalogue, Stitch Requests), search bar, category filter, view toggle

features_tested.feature: Fabric Catalogue - Search bar and category filter work
features_tested.details: Search input and category dropdown (All Categories) visible and functional

features_tested.feature: Fabric Catalogue - Add Fabric button opens dialog
features_tested.details: Add Fabric button visible for admin users, opens modal dialog when clicked

features_tested.feature: Fabric Catalogue - Add Fabric form has all required fields
features_tested.details: Form includes: Name*, Category*, Description, Color, Pattern dropdown, Composition, Price per Meter, Available Quantity, Suitable For badges, Care Instructions, Image upload

features_tested.feature: Fabric Catalogue - Stitch Requests tab accessible
features_tested.details: Tab shows 'Custom Stitch Requests' with list of requests including fabric name, type, quantity, urgency, estimated price/days, status badges, and action buttons (Confirm/Cancel)

features_tested.feature: Virtual Try-On - Size Guide button appears after entering measurements
features_tested.details: Size Guide button appears after entering measurements (Chest 96, Waist 82, Hip 94) and clicking Save Custom Measurements

features_tested.feature: Virtual Try-On - Size Guide popup shows measurement instructions with visual diagram
features_tested.details: Popup shows 'Size Guide - [Category]' title, SVG body diagram with measurement points, 'How to Measure' section with detailed instructions, and 'Pro Tips' section

features_tested.feature: Virtual Try-On - Size Guide content changes based on selected category
features_tested.details: Tops shows: Chest, Shoulder, Arm Length, Neck. Bottoms shows: Waist, Hip, Inseam, Thigh. Visual diagram also changes to show relevant measurement lines.
Returns 15 categories including Cotton, Silk, Linen, Wool, Polyester, Denim, Velvet, etc.
Returns fabrics array with total count, supports search and category filter parameters

backend_fix_applied.issue: Route ordering issue - /api/fabrics/custom-stitch-requests was being matched by /api/fabrics/{fabric_id}
backend_fix_applied.fix: Moved GET /api/fabrics/{fabric_id} route after custom-stitch-requests routes to prevent path parameter matching

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test fabrics during pytest run. Created stitch requests that remain in system for demonstration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fabric Catalogue is under EXTRA FEATURES sidebar section. Add Fabric opens a comprehensive form. Stitch Requests tab shows custom tailoring requests. Size Guide in Virtual Try-On (also under EXTRA FEATURES > Virtual Trial Room) appears after entering measurements and clicking Save Custom Measurements. The Size Guide popup dynamically updates based on the selected clothing category. Backend fabric routes fixed for proper path matching.
